use_cases: Hero section headlines with flowing curved text animation
Decorative animated text along custom paths for branding
Loading or loading-state text animations along curved paths
Marketing landing pages with dynamic text effects
Creative portfolio showcases with animated typography
ai_summary: An animated SVG text path component that renders text flowing along a configurable curved path using GSAP animation. The text continuously animates along the path with options for duration, reversal, font sizing, letter spacing, and rotation. Designed for creative typography effects in hero sections, branding, and decorative text animations where static text feels too conventional.
